description: Unified PDFGenerationService class handles invoices, quotes, and documents
Single generatePDFBuffer() using browser pool (no duplication)
Single generateAndStore() with discriminated options for invoice/quote/document
generatePDF() dispatches to getInvoiceHtml, getQuoteHtml, or getDocumentHtml
Invoice HTML generation: template resolution (client → tenant default → first), adapter, evaluate, render
Quote HTML generation: template resolution (explicit → standard code → DB resolve), adapter, evaluate, render
Document HTML generation: block content or markdown/plain text with minimal CSS wrapping
renderQuotePreview() returns HTML+CSS for live preview panel
Workflow event DOCUMENT_GENERATED published in generateAndStore for all source types
Tenant client enrichment (logo, address) for invoice rendering
Image inlining (base64 data URIs) for Puppeteer rendering via knex option
Base href tag in server-render for relative URL resolution in Puppeteer
Old server/src/services/pdf-generation.service.ts deleted
Old quotePdfGenerationService.ts deleted
All callers switched from createQuotePDFGenerationService to createPDFGenerationService (no aliases)
services/index.ts exports only consolidated service (no deprecated aliases)
InvoiceService.ts caller compiles with consolidated import
invoiceEmailHandler.ts caller compiles with consolidated import
invoiceZipHandler.ts caller compiles with consolidated import
quoteActions.ts caller compiles with consolidated import
invoiceJobActions.ts caller compiles with consolidated import
client-portal client-billing.ts caller compiles with consolidated import
documents download route compiles with consolidated import
invoicePdfGenerationAstWiring.test.ts updated for consolidated service

Build passes with no TypeScript errors from PDF generation changes
